title: Blick Intro — Lightning
purpose: Alternate Blick brand intro with lightning visual theme. Used occasionally for variety — more energetic/impact-driven feel vs the standard smoke intro.
usageRule: ALTERNATE — mix in occasionally for variety. High-energy contexts: trade show stings, event openers, campaign launches. Do not use as default.
audience: Prospective customers, event attendees, campaign audiences.
nextSteps: Use for trade show or event opener contexts where more energy is needed
Consider lightning motion as direction for high-impact Hyperframes variants (e.g. campaign launches)
